desirable.name: Desirable Hook
templates: If you wanna {desired_outcome} in {timeframe}... here's what to do
Imagine if you could {desired_state}
Here are {count} quick ways to {desired_result}
What if I told you there's a way to {desired_outcome} without {common_obstacle}
The fastest way to {desired_outcome} that nobody talks about

social_proof.name: Social Proof Hook
templates: I {achieved_result} by following this {count} simple strategy
F*ck it, here are my secrets on how I {transformation}
How to {big_result} in {short_timeframe}
I went from {before_state} to {after_state} in {timeframe}. Here's how
This one {thing} helped me {impressive_result}

controversial.name: Controversial Hook
templates: {common_belief} is just not {what_people_think}
Why doesn't anyone talk about this? {contrarian_statement}
Everything you knew about {topic} is wrong
This is my most controversial belief about {topic}
Nobody wants to hear this, but {uncomfortable_truth}

secret.name: Secret Hook
templates: Here's the secret to {desired_outcome}
Exposing my secret to {impressive_result}
{count} {things} that feel illegal to know
{thing} I wish I knew earlier
The {topic} industry doesn't want you to know this

negative.name: Negative Hook
negative.trigger: Calls out failure to create urgency
templates: If your {metric} are stuck between {range} it's because {reason}
This is why your {strategy} isn't working
You're wanting to {goal} but you're only {insufficient_action}
Stop doing {wrong_thing} if you actually want {desired_result}
The {count} mistakes killing your {area}

quick_solution.name: Quick Solution + Desired Promise
quick_solution.trigger: Rejects old way, offers new solution
templates: You need to stop doing {old_thing}. Instead do these {count} {new_things} to {desired_outcome}
Forget {old_method}. Here's what actually works for {goal}
I replaced {old_thing} with {new_thing} and {result}

lesson.name: Lesson Hook
templates: If there's one thing you'll never catch me doing, it's this: {lesson}
I tried every {thing} so you don't have to
Why 99% of {people} won't {achieve_thing}
After {timeframe} of {activity}, here's what I learned
The biggest lesson from {experience} that changed everything
